action.reasoning: Observation: 71.2% success rate. LockedRoom 2%, MultiRoom 0%, FourRooms 43%. Analysis: Hard envs need more exploration and longer rollouts. Decision: Train 50M more steps with higher entropy (0.1), longer n_steps (1024), more copies of failing envs (LockedRoom 12, MultiRoom 12, FourRooms 8).
